title: Counter-UAS sense + evidence finale
thesis: Killinchu detects a coordinated Shahed swarm passively and hands a signed Body-of-Evidence to the authorized customer. WE SENSE, WE EVIDENCE.
script: Ingest Remote-ID broadcasts of a Shahed-136 swarm + FPV cluster + lone TB2. Union-Find clustering detects the swarm. Threat-assess each. Every detection emits a signed Khipu receipt. Hand the BoE to the customer. Killinchu does NOT jam, spoof, hijack, or engage.
expected_output: swarms_detected >= 1; signed receipts in /receipt/ledger; BoE bundle.
fallback: Use the seeded SE-Ukraine broadcast set built into /swarm/topology; verify receipts offline.
disclaimer: WE SENSE. WE EVIDENCE. WE DO NOT JACK INTO THIRD-PARTY DRONES. Passive sensing + evidence only; offensive action is the lawful customer's responsibility. See /api/killinchu/v2/legal.
